title: Tessera authorship type_payload v0.1
description: JSON Schema for the type_payload of an authorship Tessera per spec/v0.1/tessera.md §7.1. This schema validates the type_payload object only; the surrounding envelope is validated by tessera.schema.json.

content_hash.description: sha256 hex digest of the work.

content_mime.description: MIME type of the work (e.g. text/markdown, image/png).

content_uri.description: Optional URI to a stable copy of the content.

tools_used.description: List of tool identifiers that participated in the authoring session (e.g. 'veritas-desktop@0.1', 'veritas-extension/chrome@0.1').

behavioral_fingerprint.description: base64url-encoded sha256 of the behavioral fingerprint vector. The raw vector stays on the issuer's client and is never transmitted as part of the Tessera (spec §10).

process_recording_hash.description: Optional base64url-encoded sha256 of an encrypted process recording. The plaintext is never part of the Tessera; release of the encrypted blob requires explicit user consent (spec §10).
